title: Beautifully Massive
description: A modpack that brings together great mods, to create something that is absolutely beautiful.
body:
![Beautifully Massive Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7259643a4973228e38206d60e3bd42df4e1b32e0.jpeg)
## Description
Experience the massive worlds and expansive landscapes with Beautifully Massive, this pack aims to bring back the excitement of exploring again. Building settlements along the coast to high up in the mountains. Emphasizing exceptional world generation while staying true to the Vanilla essence.

## Server Information
The server download is at the bottom of the version that you have selected. It is a .zip file that you will need to download and extract. It contains the server files, mods and configs that you will need to start the server.
